title: Network International powers card tokenization for Apple smartphones in Egypt
message_html: Network International powers card tokenization for Apple smartphones in Egypt ...
snippet: Network International , a leading fintech company across the Middle East and Africa, has announced the successful enablement of Apple Pay acceptance by powering card tokenisation for Apple smartphones for four renowned Egyptian banks, as part of the country’s digital transformation initiatives.

title: Cboe Exchange Proposes Rule Changes for Options on Commodity-Based Trusts Listing Criteria
message_html: Cboe Exchange Proposes Rule Changes for Options on Commodity-Based Trusts Listing Criteria ...
snippet: FED: Self-Regulatory Organizations; Cboe Exchange, Inc.; Notice of Filing of a Proposed Rule Change to Rules 4.3 (Criteria for Underlying Securities) and 4.4 (Withdrawal of Approval of Underlying Securities) To Establish Listing Criteria and Withdrawal Standards for Options on Commodity-Based Trusts
